title: Brazilian Biscuit Bake
description: A delicious Brazilian-inspired dessert featuring a crunchy biscuit crust and a sweet, juicy filling. Perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together crushed biscuits and sugar.
Press the biscuit mixture into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and mix in juicy and grassy.
Pour the egg mixture over the biscuit crust.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Allow to cool completely before serving.
